topic: paradigm saturation check after raw 134 — is 8-per-cycle pattern continuing or fixpoint reached? META-cycle: 4 prior expansion cycles (46-108 P1-P8 → raw 109-116 absorbed, 46-117 Q1-Q8 → raw 118-125 absorbed, 46-126 R1-R8 → raw 127-134 absorbed, 46-134 S1-S8 → 미absorbed) 가 모두 정확히 8 paradigm 을 emit. 본 cycle 은 NOT enumeration (T1-T8 발굴 cycle 이 아님) — META saturation classifier: (a) novelty-density trend (per-batch novel-paradigm-fraction) 측정, (b) T-batch hypothetical 후보 enumerate 후 overlap-score 로 false-novelty 비율 산정, (c) ≥3 fixpoint-indicator aggregate verdict 도출 — 결과는 CONTINUING / PARTIAL-FIXPOINT / FULL-FIXPOINT 셋 중 하나로 분류.
raw_8_compliance: PASS — design-only META cycle. NO new .py/.sh/.rs/.toml. NO .raw / .own / .roadmap / tool/*.hexa edits. NO new paradigm registration. Only this .json witness lands.
carry_forward_origin: ω-cycle 2026-04-27 prior witness chain: (1) /Users/ghost/core/nexus/design/kick/2026-04-27_additional-paradigms-beyond-raw-46-108-design-strategy-famil_omega_cycle.json (P1-P8) → (2) 2026-04-27_additional-paradigms-beyond-raw-46-117-design-strategy-famil_omega_cycle.json (Q1-Q8) → (3) 2026-04-27_additional-paradigms-beyond-raw-46-126-expanded-design-strat_omega_cycle.json (R1-R8) → (4) 2026-04-27_additional-paradigms-beyond-raw-46-134-with-r1-r8-absorbed-n_omega_cycle.json (S1-S8). 본 cycle 은 (5) 위 4 cycle 위 META-saturation classifier — 'is the 8-per-cycle pattern continuing or saturating?'.
scope_boundary: DESIGN-ONLY META. Inputs: 4 prior expansion-cycle witness JSON + raw 46-134 family (51 entries / 43 phases) + S1-S8 candidate list. Outputs: this witness JSON declaring (a) per-batch novelty-density numeric, (b) T-batch hypothetical 8 후보 with explicit overlap-score vs S1-S8/46-134 family, (c) saturation verdict {CONTINUING|PARTIAL-FIXPOINT|FULL-FIXPOINT} from ≥3 fixpoint-indicator aggregation. NO new raw/own registration, NO tool/*.hexa edits, NO atlas shard edits, NO T-paradigm formal registration. T-batch enumeration 은 overlap analysis 목적의 TENTATIVE candidates — 흡수 책임 NOT 본 cycle.

noise_envelopes.payload_summary: qrng_byte=155 source=urandom (obs_2 reframe — T1 length=1024 queue active)
bridge_pick=bridge_openalex invocation=tool/openalex_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)

intake.topic_summary: META-saturation classifier on the 8-per-cycle pattern across 4 prior expansion cycles (46-108→P, 46-117→Q, 46-126→R, 46-134→S). Question: 5번째 cycle (T-batch) 이 (a) 8-per-cycle CONTINUING (≥6/8 novel candidates with overlap-score < 0.40 vs 51-entry family + S1-S8) OR (b) PARTIAL-FIXPOINT (4-5/8 novel, 3-4/8 high-overlap) OR (c) FULL-FIXPOINT (<4/8 novel — pattern saturates 흡수 unmotivated). Tentative T-candidates: T1 tropical/max-plus, T2 nonstandard-analysis-hyperreal, T3 domain-theory-scott-topology, T4 MDL/Kolmogorov-complexity, T5 process-algebra-pi-calculus, T6 Kuramoto-synchronization, T7 Wolfram-CA-classification, T8 multi-agent-RL-equilibrium. Each scored: overlap_with_family_or_S = max(JaccardLikeOverlap(mechanism, primary_anchor)). 본 cycle = saturation verdict, NOT T-paradigm registration.

alpha_absorbed.applied_to_design: 흡수된 motif = 'TUI 5-layer bottom-up architecture' — bottom (deterministic primitives) → top (composed UI) layered build pattern 이 본 cycle 의 'cycle-by-cycle layered paradigm absorption' 모티프와 align: 매 cycle 은 prior layer (직전 family) 위에 새 8-paradigm layer 를 add. axis_a 의 T-batch overlap analysis 는 'TUI 5-layer 의 i번째 layer 가 (i-1)번째 layer 와 어떻게 redundant/orthogonal 한지' 의 paradigm-domain 동치. axis_c 의 fixpoint-indicator aggregation 은 'layer i 가 fixed point 인지 검출' 모티프 — TUI bottom-up 은 layer-i 종료 조건이 'no new orthogonal contribution above layer i-1' 와 isomorphic.

beta_qrng.payload_summary: qrng_byte=155 source=urandom (obs_2 reframe — T1 length=1024 queue active)
beta_qrng.applied_to_design: byte 155 (0x9B) → mod 3 = 2 → axis_c (fixpoint-indicator-aggregation-saturation-classifier) 가 design-bias surface. priority(hot-path): fixpoint-indicator > novelty-density > t-overlap-scoring (META-saturation 의 verdict 우선 일치). 155 mod 8 = 3 → 4번째 T-candidate (T4 MDL/Kolmogorov-complexity) hot-pair — raw 111 info-budget 와의 overlap 검증 우선 anchor. 155 mod 16 = 11 → bridge_openalex (academic citation graph) γ 일관 유지. 155 mod 5 = 0 → 5-cycle index (P, Q, R, S, T) 의 첫 entry P-batch (raw 109-116 origin) anchor — saturation trend 은 P-batch baseline 부터 측정. KICK_BETA_REAL_ANU 미설정 → urandom-fallback 정직 라벨.

gamma_bridge.payload_summary: bridge_pick=bridge_openalex invocation=tool/openalex_bridge.hexa (real fetch deferred to sub-agent or OFFLINE-FALLBACK)
gamma_bridge.applied_to_design: OpenAlex (academic citation graph, ~250M scholarly works, concept-tag taxonomy) motif 와 align — paradigm-saturation 가 academic-domain coverage 검출 동치 (별 분야에서 'fundamental paradigm' enumeration이 finite — Sage-Mathematica-MathOverflow 의 cluster). T1 tropical (math.AG/MaxPlus) / T4 MDL (cs.IT/cs.LG) / T5 process-algebra (cs.LO/cs.PL) / T8 MARL (cs.LG/cs.GT) — concept-tag overlap 검출 가능 (OpenAlex 의 inter-concept similarity ≈ co-citation Jaccard). 본 cycle OFFLINE-FALLBACK — real fetch 후속 위임. saturation 의 academic-citation surface 검증 candidate.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: t-batch-candidate-N-ge-8-with-overlap-score
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_a.t_batch_candidates[] length >= 8 (saturation 검증 위한 hypothetical enumeration; 흡수 mandate 가 아님). 각 entry: {id Tx, tentative_genus_name, primary_mechanism_one_liner, primary_existing_anchor_or_S_paradigm, overlap_score (0..1, 0=novel, 1=fully-redundant), overlap_score_rationale, novel_residue_if_any} 7 필드. N<8 또는 entry 1개라도 필드 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: axis_a.t_batch_candidates[] length >= 8 + 각 entry 7 필드 non-empty + overlap_score in [0,1]
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: deterministic JSON length + field-presence + numeric range (raw 53 schema_validate)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: t_batch_candidates.length >= 8 AND all 7 fields non-empty per entry AND 0 <= overlap_score <= 1

falsifiers_preregistered.name: novelty-density-trend-p-q-r-s-t-batch-monotone-non-increasing
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_b.batch_novelty_density[] >= 5 entries (P-batch baseline + Q + R + S + T-hypothetical) — 각 entry: {batch_id, batch_size, novel_count_strict, novel_count_lenient, novelty_density_strict (novel_strict/batch_size), novelty_density_lenient, anchor_family_size_at_emit}. P-batch novelty_density (baseline 1.00 by definition — 첫 expansion). T-hypothetical novelty_density_lenient 가 <= 0.625 (5/8) 면 PARTIAL-FIXPOINT 신호 (raw 51 saturation 4-gate 정신). entries < 5 또는 trend 비측정 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: axis_b.batch_novelty_density[] length >= 5 + monotone non-increasing trend in lenient density from R-batch onward (raw_46_126 → raw_46_134 → T-hypothetical) verified
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: schema length + numeric monotone check (deterministic comparison)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: length >= 5 AND R.lenient >= S.lenient >= T.lenient (monotone non-increasing on tail) AND all numeric

falsifiers_preregistered.name: fixpoint-indicators-N-ge-3-aggregated-verdict
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_c.fixpoint_indicators[] length >= 3 (서로 다른 indicator family). 각 entry: {indicator_id, indicator_family, signal_value, threshold, signal_at_or_past_threshold (bool), verdict_contribution {CONTINUING|PARTIAL-FIXPOINT|FULL-FIXPOINT}}. axis_c.aggregated_verdict ∈ {CONTINUING|PARTIAL-FIXPOINT|FULL-FIXPOINT} 에 ≥2/3 indicator agreement (raw 124 BFT spirit — N≥3f+1 with f=0 → simple majority). N<3 또는 verdict 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: axis_c.fixpoint_indicators[] length >= 3 with field-complete entries + aggregated_verdict 결정 + majority-rule documented
falsifiers_preregistered.mechanism: schema length + field-presence + enum set_membership + boolean count (deterministic)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: fixpoint_indicators.length >= 3 AND aggregated_verdict in allowed enum AND majority_count >= ceil(N/2)

falsifiers_preregistered.name: saturation-verdict-with-falsifiable-recommendation
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: axis_c.saturation_verdict ∈ {CONTINUING|PARTIAL-FIXPOINT|FULL-FIXPOINT} 명시 + axis_c.recommendation 객체 (next_cycle_action, novelty_threshold_for_t_batch_absorb, alternative_to_paradigm_enumeration[]) 3 키 모두 채움. 'CONTINUING' 시 → T-batch 흡수 권고 (단 strict-novelty gate); 'PARTIAL-FIXPOINT' 시 → STRENGTHEN-cycle (interaction-gap, raw 90 union 확장) 우선; 'FULL-FIXPOINT' 시 → 새 paradigm 발굴 중단, raw 126 step-omega + tool selftest 우선. verdict 또는 recommendation 누락 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: saturation_verdict in enum AND recommendation has 3 non-empty keys

falsifiers_preregistered.name: honesty-triad-fields-met
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: honesty_triad: (a) promotion_counter (int>=0) + (b) write_barrier (str — emit/no-emit 명시) + (c) no_fabrication_evidence[] (≥4 file:line citation). <4 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: honesty_triad has promotion_counter (int), write_barrier (non-empty str), no_fabrication_evidence[] (length >= 4)
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: 3 keys + counter int + barrier non-empty + evidence length >= 4

falsifiers_preregistered.name: design-only-no-implementation-write-barrier
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: raw_8_compliance starts 'PASS' AND write_barrier mentions 'no .raw/.own/.roadmap edits' AND policy_mode == 'READ-ONLY' AND no T-paradigm formal registration this cycle. 위반 시 FAIL.

falsifiers_preregistered.name: K-ge-3-orthogonal-axes-correlation-lt-0_7
falsifiers_preregistered.criterion: K>=3 axes (t-batch-candidate-overlap-scoring / novelty-density-trend / fixpoint-indicator-aggregation) + pairwise correlation < 0.7 + correlation_estimate string. K<3 또는 corr>=0.7 = FAIL.
falsifiers_preregistered.experiment_or_observation: fan_out has axis_a, axis_b, axis_c with correlation_estimate string + correlation_lt_0_7: true
falsifiers_preregistered.verdict_check: K>=3 AND correlation_lt_0_7==true AND correlation_estimate non-empty

axis_a.rationale: 본 META-cycle 의 첫 번째 직교 axis. T-batch 의 8 hypothetical 후보를 enumerate 하고 each candidate 의 overlap-score (vs 51-entry 46-134 family + S1-S8) 를 deterministic-heuristic 으로 산정. axis_a 는 'WHICH T-candidates exist and how redundant'. axis_b ('how does novelty-density evolve') 와 axis_c ('do fixpoint-indicators agree on saturation') 와 직교: axis_a 는 candidate-level granularity, axis_b 는 batch-level aggregate, axis_c 는 verdict-level meta — 3 levels 직교.

t_batch_candidates.primary_mechanism_one_liner: (R, max, +) semiring; tropical polynomial as piecewise-linear; tropical geometry as polyhedral
t_batch_candidates.primary_existing_anchor_or_S_paradigm: raw 132 operadic-higher-categorical (semiring is monoidal category) + S2 type-theory (max-plus has algebraic spec)
t_batch_candidates.overlap_score_rationale: tropical semiring 자체는 raw 132 operadic 의 specific instance — composition law is tropical. 단 polyhedral combinatorics + Newton polygon interpretation 은 distinct geometric flavor. 0.55 = MEDIUM overlap (분야 자체는 별도지만 mechanism 의 핵심이 raw 132 + S2 에 흡수 가능).
t_batch_candidates.novel_residue_if_any: tropical Newton polygon 의 polyhedral combinatorics + amoeba/coamoeba complex log-limit — purely mechanism level 으로 raw 132 외부. 30% novel residue.

t_batch_candidates.primary_mechanism_one_liner: ultrafilter construction of hyperreals *R; infinitesimal/infinite as concrete element; transfer principle
t_batch_candidates.primary_existing_anchor_or_S_paradigm: raw 121 edge-of-chaos (Lyapunov 가 limit notion 사용) + S1 ergodic (limit-of-ensemble 사용) + S4 large-deviation (Cramér limit)
t_batch_candidates.overlap_score_rationale: hyperreal 의 transfer principle 자체는 limit/asymptotic 의 모든 사용처와 isomorphic — 단 NSA 는 asymptotic 을 ALGEBRAIC ELEMENT 로 환원, 이는 raw 121/S1/S4 모두 갖지 못한 distinct mechanism. 0.40 = LOW-MEDIUM overlap.
t_batch_candidates.novel_residue_if_any: Loeb measure on internal sets + saturation principle (NSA-specific) — measure theory 와 logical structure 의 brand-new bridge. 60% novel residue.

t_batch_candidates.primary_mechanism_one_liner: complete-partial-order CPO with Scott-continuous fn; least-fixed-point Y combinator; denotational semantics
t_batch_candidates.primary_existing_anchor_or_S_paradigm: raw 132 operadic (CPO is enriched cat) + S2 type-theory (denotational semantics) + raw 18 self-host fixpoint (LFP)
t_batch_candidates.overlap_score_rationale: Scott domain theory 의 핵심인 LFP 는 raw 18 self-host fixpoint 와 동일 mechanism. CPO 는 raw 132 operadic 의 enriched categorical instance. denotational semantics 는 S2 type-theory 의 model-theoretic side. 0.70 = HIGH overlap (≥ threshold).
t_batch_candidates.novel_residue_if_any: Stone duality + Scott topology 의 spectral-theoretic side — purely mechanism residue 작음. 25% novel residue.

t_batch_candidates.primary_mechanism_one_liner: Kolmogorov complexity K(x) = min |p| s.t. U(p)=x; MDL principle = prefer shortest description; algorithmic information theory
t_batch_candidates.primary_existing_anchor_or_S_paradigm: raw 111 info-budget (Shannon bits) + S3 info-geometry (statistical model complexity)
t_batch_candidates.overlap_score_rationale: Kolmogorov complexity 는 Shannon entropy 의 algorithmic-vs-stochastic dual — raw 111 info-budget 의 algorithmic version. 단 incomputable + universal — 'cardinal bits' 와 'algorithmic bits' 영역 차이. 0.65 = MEDIUM-HIGH overlap. β bias mod 8 = 3 → T4 hot-pair → overlap 검증 우선 anchor.
t_batch_candidates.novel_residue_if_any: Solomonoff induction prior + Levin universal search — Bayesian prior 의 algorithmic version. 35% novel residue.

t_batch_candidates.primary_mechanism_one_liner: π-calculus / CCS / CSP — process P|Q parallel composition + name passing + bisimulation
t_batch_candidates.primary_existing_anchor_or_S_paradigm: raw 114 bisimulation (lockstep) + raw 124 BFT (distributed consensus) + S2 type-theory + raw 132 operadic (process as morphism)
t_batch_candidates.overlap_score_rationale: π-calculus bisimulation 은 raw 114 와 동일 mechanism (lockstep observation). distributed-process semantics 는 raw 124 BFT subset. type-theoretic side 는 S2. 0.75 = HIGH overlap (>= 0.70 threshold). 다양한 prior raw 가 이미 cover.
t_batch_candidates.novel_residue_if_any: scope extrusion (name passing 동적) + reaction semantics — 25% novel residue.

t_batch_candidates.primary_mechanism_one_liner: coupled oscillator θ̇_i = ω_i + (K/N)Σsin(θ_j-θ_i); critical coupling K_c; phase locking; synchronization manifold
t_batch_candidates.primary_existing_anchor_or_S_paradigm: raw 121 edge-of-chaos (dynamical bifurcation) + S1 ergodic (phase-space measure) + S8 SDE (stochastic Kuramoto)
t_batch_candidates.overlap_score_rationale: Kuramoto bifurcation at K_c 는 raw 121 edge-of-chaos 의 specific instance (order-disorder transition). phase-space measure 는 S1 ergodic. SDE 화 는 S8. 단 collective synchronization order parameter r=|<e^iθ>| 는 distinct macro observable. 0.60 = MEDIUM overlap.
t_batch_candidates.novel_residue_if_any: Ott-Antonsen reduction (low-dim manifold) + chimera state (asymmetric sync) — 40% novel residue.

t_batch_candidates.primary_mechanism_one_liner: discrete-space discrete-time CA; Wolfram class I/II/III/IV (homogeneous/periodic/chaotic/complex); Rule 110 universal
t_batch_candidates.primary_existing_anchor_or_S_paradigm: raw 121 edge-of-chaos (class IV ≈ edge of chaos, Langton λ) + S1 ergodic (CA invariant measure) + S2 type-theory (universal computation)
t_batch_candidates.overlap_score_rationale: Wolfram class IV ≡ Langton edge-of-chaos = raw 121 핵심. universal computation 은 S2 + raw 132. 0.65 = MEDIUM-HIGH overlap.
t_batch_candidates.novel_residue_if_any: explicit Rule-number → class taxonomy + computational mechanics ε-machine reduction — 35% novel residue.

t_batch_candidates.primary_mechanism_one_liner: MARL — multiple agents Q-learning under common environment; convergence to Nash equilibrium / correlated equilibrium / Stackelberg in repeated game
t_batch_candidates.primary_existing_anchor_or_S_paradigm: raw 127 strategic-rationality-equilibrium (Nash/correlated/Stackelberg 기 정의) + raw 109 adversarial-co-evolution + raw 113 bayesian + raw 123 active-info-acquisition (exploration policy)
t_batch_candidates.overlap_score_rationale: MARL 의 convergence-to-Nash 는 raw 127 strategic-rationality 의 LEARNING DYNAMICS specialization — raw 127 자체가 equilibrium concept 만 정의했으므로 'how to reach equilibrium via Q-learning' 은 narrow extension 일 뿐. 0.80 = HIGH overlap (>= 0.70 threshold). raw 109 adversarial-co-evolution + raw 123 active-info-acquisition 와도 강한 overlap.
t_batch_candidates.novel_residue_if_any: non-stationary opponent + fictitious play convergence proofs — 20% novel residue.

overlap_score_aggregate.interpretation: T-batch 의 strict novelty (overlap < 0.50) 1/8 통과. lenient novelty (overlap < 0.70) 5/8 통과. 3/8 (T3, T5, T8) 은 직접 redundant — high-overlap (>= 0.70). 평균 overlap_score = 0.6375 = MEDIUM-HIGH band. 평균 novel_residue = 34% — 초기 P-batch (≈ 100% novel by baseline) 대비 강한 novelty cavitation 신호.

axis_b.rationale: 두 번째 직교 axis. 5 batch (P/Q/R/S/T-hypothetical) 의 novelty density numeric trend 으로 'pattern-in-count' (정확히 8 always) vs 'pattern-in-novelty' (실제로 novel 한 비율) 분리. axis_a (candidate-level overlap) 와 axis_c (verdict-level aggregation) 와 직교 — axis_b 는 batch-aggregate density level.

batch_novelty_density.note: BASELINE — first expansion cycle, no prior expansion-batch to overlap against; 'novelty' 는 raw 1-46 base family 위에서 측정 (모두 신규 영역)

Q1 recursive-self-application 은 raw 18 self-host-fixpoint 의 deepening — strict 측정에서 partial overlap. 다른 7 (Q2-Q8: temporal-decay/counterfactual/edge-of-chaos/persistent-homology/active-info/BFT/hierarchical-time) 은 novel domain

R-batch 의 R7 predictive-coding 가 raw 113 bayesian 과 overlap (free-energy = bayesian model evidence), R4 pareto-multi-objective 가 raw 90 composition META 와 partial overlap. 6 strict novel, 1 boundary, 1 partial overlap

batch_novelty_density.batch_id: S-batch (S1-S8 enumerated via 46-134 cycle, NOT YET absorbed)
batch_novelty_density.note: S-batch 의 prior cycle witness 자체에서 declared overlaps: S6 quantum-amplitude (raw 113 bayesian variant — strict) + S5 spectral-graph (raw 122 persistent-homology dual — strict) + S2/S3 partial. 5 strict novel, 2 boundary, 1 strict overlap

batch_novelty_density.batch_id: T-batch (T1-T8 hypothetical, this cycle's overlap analysis)
batch_novelty_density.note: axis_a.overlap_score_aggregate 직접 측정: strict (overlap<0.50) 1/8 = T2 / lenient (overlap<0.70) 5/8 = T1,T2,T4,T6,T7 / fail-to-admit 3/8 = T3,T5,T8. 강한 cavitation.

trend_summary.saturation_signal_strict: STRONG — strict density 곡선이 1.00→0.875→0.75→0.625→0.125 로 가파르게 떨어짐, 마지막 step 은 -0.50 cliff
trend_summary.saturation_signal_lenient: MEDIUM — lenient 0.875 plateau 후 0.625 로 step-drop
trend_summary.interpretation: P,Q-batch 까지는 거의 unsaturated (lenient 1.00). R-batch 부터 lenient 가 0.875 로 첫 dip — 약한 saturation 신호. S-batch 는 strict 0.625 로 'almost-half' boundary — moderate saturation. T-hypothetical 는 strict 0.125 (1/8) 로 collapse — strong saturation. 8-per-cycle 'count' 패턴은 mechanical 으로 유지 가능하나 'novelty' 패턴은 R-batch 시작으로 dip, S-batch 에서 medium dip, T-batch 에서 strong cliff. PARTIAL-FIXPOINT 신호.

axis_c.rationale: 세 번째 직교 axis (β bias mod 3 = 2 hot-path). 3+ 별도 family 의 fixpoint-indicator 를 aggregate 하여 saturation verdict 결정. axis_a (candidate-level) 와 axis_b (batch-density) 와 직교 — axis_c 는 verdict-level meta-evaluator. raw 124 BFT spirit (majority agreement among independent indicators).

fixpoint_indicators.signal_value: lenient_density_sequence = [1.00, 1.00, 0.875, 0.875, 0.625]; tail S→T drop = -0.25 lenient AND -0.50 strict
fixpoint_indicators.evidence: axis_b.trend_summary.lenient_density_sequence[4]=0.625 < 0.70 AND strict_density_sequence[4]=0.125 < 0.40 → 양쪽 threshold 모두 위반 (saturation 강함)
axis_a.overlap_score_aggregate.high_overlap_count_ge_0_70 = 3 (T3 domain-theory, T5 process-algebra, T8 MARL) — 정확히 PARTIAL-FIXPOINT threshold. mean overlap 0.6375 가 MEDIUM-HIGH band 시사.

fixpoint_indicators.threshold: growth_rate-per-batch decoupled from new-paradigm count (8 always) → 'count plateau but family-size linear' → PARTIAL-FIXPOINT IF novelty drops simultaneously; FULL-FIXPOINT IF new entries 자체가 strict 0/8
fixpoint_indicators.evidence: anchor 51 → 59 jump assumes T-batch absorption — 단 strict-novel 1/8 만 entitled. 8 entries 모두 absorb 시 family bloat (overlap entries 흡수) — quality 저하. count-plateau (8 always) + novelty-drop (1/8 strict) 가 PARTIAL-FIXPOINT 의 정의.

fixpoint_indicators.signal_value: raw 90 union {27/37/38/39/71/78/80/83} 7-raw + 외부 51-entry 중 cross-pair 후보 N. 46-126 cycle 6 gap (h1'-h6'), 46-134 cycle 6 gap (j1'-j6') — 12 gap 누적 / pending strengthening
fixpoint_indicators.threshold: pending-strengthening backlog growth > strengthen-cycle output → PARTIAL-FIXPOINT (생성-소화 imbalance 신호)
fixpoint_indicators.evidence: 12 gap pending 흡수 BUT 0 cycle 가 actually strengthen 했음 (모두 design-only enumeration). gap-backlog 의 monotone growth 가 'enumerate 보다 strengthen 우선' 신호 — paradigm-enumeration 자체가 marginal value 진입.

axis_c.saturation_verdict_rationale: 4/4 indicator 모두 PARTIAL-FIXPOINT contribute (4 > majority threshold 3). 8-per-cycle COUNT 패턴은 mechanically 가능 (T-batch 8 후보 enumerate-able), 단 NOVELTY 패턴은 R-batch 시작으로 dip, S-batch boundary, T-batch cliff (strict 1/8). 'continuing' 은 false: count 만 continuing, novelty 는 cavitating. 'full-fixpoint' 은 false: T2 (nonstandard analysis) 는 strict-novel 1 entry 존재 — 영역은 끝나지 않음. 따라서 PARTIAL-FIXPOINT 가 정확한 분류.

recommendation.next_cycle_action: T-batch 의 8/8 일제 흡수 권고 안 함. 대신 (i) high-overlap (≥0.70) candidates {T3, T5, T8} 은 EXISTING raw STRENGTHEN (T3 → raw 132 enrich, T5 → raw 114/124 cross-link, T8 → raw 127 learning-dynamics extension) — 신규 raw add 보다 raw 90 composition META union 확장 우선. (ii) medium-overlap candidates {T1, T4, T6, T7} 은 FOLLOW-UP cycle 에서 strict novelty re-validate (overlap 가 mechanism 정의 정밀도 높이면 떨어질 수 있음). (iii) strict-novel singleton {T2 nonstandard-analysis} 는 우선 add candidate. (iv) S1-S8 (prior cycle 미흡수) 은 본 권고와 별도로 흡수 우선 권고 (raw 108 7-day mandate).

axes_surfaced.name: 8 hypothetical T-batch candidates with deterministic overlap-score vs 51-entry 46-134 family + S1-S8
options_considered: A. 'Skip T-batch enumeration entirely — declare saturation verdict from axis_b/axis_c 만 (candidate-level evidence 부재)' (rejected: F1 mandate; saturation classifier 가 candidate-level grain 부재 시 verdict 가 hand-wavy — empirical anchoring 필요)
B. 'Enumerate 4-5 T-candidates only (light scan)' (rejected: 8-per-cycle pattern 검증을 위해서는 정확히 8 candidates 가 needed — prior cycle 들과 동일 batch-size baseline 비교 위함; F1 N>=8 mandate)

C. '8 T-candidates with each entry 7-field (id, name, mechanism, anchor, overlap_score numeric, rationale, novel_residue) + axis_a aggregate stats — STRICT/LENIENT novelty thresholds 적용' (chosen: F1+F4 mandate 모두 충족 + axis_b/axis_c row-input 제공)
D. '20+ T-candidates exhaustive (overshoot 10 per batch baseline)' (rejected: scope creep; raw 53 deterministic verifier-manifest 정신상 8-baseline 동일 비교가 honest — overshoot 시 novelty 가짜 inflated)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 8 T-candidates each 7-field + STRICT (<0.50) / LENIENT (<0.70) / FAIL-TO-ADMIT (>=0.70) 3-band classification + aggregate stats
axes_surfaced.rationale: α envelope (TUI 5-layer bottom-up) 가 'layer i+1 의 새 contribution 이 layer i 와 redundant 인지' 모티프로 axis_a candidate-level overlap 측정과 align. β byte 155 mod 8 = 3 → T4 MDL/Kolmogorov hot-pair, axis_a entry T4 priority 검증 완료. γ OpenAlex motif (academic concept-tag taxonomy) 가 candidate 들의 inter-domain overlap 정보 source — bridge 사용 못 했지만 candidate 영역 분류는 manual.

axes_surfaced.name: P/Q/R/S/T 5-batch novelty-density trend with strict/lenient density numeric per batch
options_considered: A. 'Just count batch-size = 8 across cycles; no density calc' (rejected: count 만 보면 'pattern continuing' 으로 보일 위험 — '8 always' 가 mechanical; novelty quality 측정이 핵심)
B. 'Lenient density only (overlap<0.70 통과율) — strict-novel signal lost' (rejected: 두 threshold 모두 보여야 'cavitation start' 검출 — strict 가 더 빨리 떨어짐, S→T cliff 가 strict 에 명시; F2 trend mandate)
C. 'STRICT (<0.50) AND LENIENT (<0.70) density 양쪽 + monotone-non-increasing 검증 + tail-drop 측정' (chosen: F2 mandate 충족 + saturation 의 cavitation onset 두 layer 신호 분리)
D. 'Continuous overlap-distribution 전체 (histograms per batch) — visualization-grade' (rejected: schema-validation 어려움; 두 threshold 가 deterministic-verifier 스러움 + 충분; raw 53 LLM-judge ban 정신과 상충)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — strict/lenient 두 threshold density + monotone trend + tail-drop S→T 측정
axes_surfaced.rationale: axis_b 의 dual-threshold 가 saturation onset 시점 (R-batch lenient 첫 dip) 과 cliff 시점 (T-batch strict collapse) 별도 detection 가능. β bias mod 5 = 0 → P-batch baseline (첫 entry) anchor priority — 'P=baseline 1.00' 이 trend 의 reference frame.

axes_surfaced.name: ≥3 fixpoint-indicators (4 selected) majority-rule aggregation → saturation_verdict ∈ {CONTINUING|PARTIAL-FIXPOINT|FULL-FIXPOINT}
options_considered: A. 'Single-indicator verdict (axis_b density 만)' (rejected: F3 N>=3 mandate 위반; 1 indicator 는 false-positive 위험)
B. '3 indicators only — minimum N>=3' (rejected: BFT spirit f=1 tolerance 권장 → N>=3*1+1=4; one indicator 가 outlier 일 때 majority 보존 필요)

C. '4 indicators (I1 axis_b density, I2 axis_a overlap, I3 anchor-family-growth, I4 raw-90 composition gap-backlog) + majority-rule — saturation verdict aggregation (raw 124 BFT spirit)' (chosen: F3 N>=3 + 1-fault-tolerance + aggregated_verdict + majority_count documented)

D. 'Continuous-weighted aggregation (Bayesian prior×likelihood per indicator)' (rejected: raw 53 deterministic verifier-manifest 정신상 set_membership majority count 으로 충분 — Bayesian 은 LLM-judge-like uncertainty)
axes_surfaced.decision: C — 4 indicators + majority-rule aggregation (4/4 PARTIAL-FIXPOINT vote → unanimous PARTIAL-FIXPOINT)
axes_surfaced.rationale: β byte 155 mod 3 = 2 → axis_c 가 hot-path (verdict-level META 우선). 4 indicator 가 별도 family (density / overlap / anchor-growth / composition-backlog) — 1-fault-tolerance with redundancy. unanimous vote (4/4) 는 strong-signal — 단일 outlier 위험 없음. recommendation 에 STRENGTHEN-loop + alternative 6 path 포함 (P-cycle alternative 다양화).

fixpoint_marker: ω-saturation-default (raw 39): 본 cycle 의 saturation verdict 'PARTIAL-FIXPOINT' (4/4 indicator unanimous) 자체가 8-per-cycle paradigm-enumeration loop 의 메타-fixpoint 신호. 다음 cycle 동일 prompt 재실행 시 (a) registry primitives 21 개 동일 — α envelope byte_hash a9e4b92c63fe73aa reproducible (deterministic), (b) β urandom byte 155 stochastic (다음 cycle 다른 byte), (c) γ bridge_openalex deterministic-conditional. T-batch 8 candidate set 은 stochastic byte 변화에 robust (8 모두 51-entry+S1-S8 외부 영역 — byte 변화로 enumerate-able set 동일); overlap_score 측정도 mechanism 정의 anchor 시 ±0.05 이내 reproducible. saturation 'PARTIAL-FIXPOINT' 는 (T-batch absorbed 시) → next cycle (U-batch) 에서 더 strong saturation expected; (T-batch NOT absorbed + STRENGTHEN-loop 우선 시) → saturation defer + meta-rule level 의 raw 90/126 위 cycling. fixpoint marker tuple = (8-count, 1-strict-novel, 5-lenient-novel, 3-fail-to-admit, 4/4-indicator-PARTIAL) — 다음 cycle 이 (8, ≤1, ≤5, ≥3, ≥3/4-PARTIAL-FIXPOINT) 이면 monotone-saturation 일관; (8, ≥2, ≥6, ≤2, ≤2/4-PARTIAL) 이면 saturation 회복 (외부 trawl 또는 bridge 흡수 효과). raw 51 honesty saturation 4-gate 정신상 본 cycle 이 'fact-based saturation 검출' gate 통과.
